reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 오홍! 신상품이 나와서 사봤어요! 우리집 댕댕공쥬는 엄빠가 나갈 준비하고 간식을 주면 먹고 혼자 잘 쉬기 때문에 그 때 주기에 딱 맞는 간식입니당❤️ 이번 간식도 성공❤️ 포장지 뜯자마자 빨리 달라고 쳐다보는 귀야운 뽕이이이이 너무 귀여워ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: Oh wow! A new product came out so I grabbed it! 🎀 My princess pup at home eats well when we give her a snack before we leave and then rests quietly by herself, so this is the perfect treat for those moments ❤️ Another success ❤️ The moment we opened the packaging, cute little Ppong looked at us so eagerly wanting it right away ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ So adorable!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 일단 테스트로 구매 해봤어요! 델탈껌 엄청 좋아해서 배송오자마자 신나서 킁킁 간식박스인건 어찌 알았을까? 포장은 사람이 먹는 에너지바 같이 생겼어요.먹으면 힘이 날것 같은 느낌적인 느낌.. 신나서 물고가는 보리 너무 잘 먹네요 기호성 체크완료!
reviews.content_en: I bought it as a test first! She absolutely loves dental chews, so the moment it arrived she got so excited sniffing around—how did she even know it was a treat box?? 😆 The packaging looks like an energy bar that humans eat. It gives off that feeling like you'd get energy from eating it... Bori gets so excited biting into it and eats it really well! Palatability check complete! ✅

reviews.name: N****
reviews.content:
애들이 환장하고 먹네요!
개별포장이라 너무 편하고 위생적이에요
좀 딱딱하긴 하지만 손으로 잘라서 줄수있어요
reviews.content_en:
The kids absolutely go crazy for these! 🐕
The individual packaging is so convenient and hygienic.
They're a bit hard, but I can easily cut them with a knife and give them that way.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
기호성 진짜 대박이예요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 처음 받았을때부터 간식인줄 알고 킁가킁가하더니 패키지도 너무 귀욤뽀짝하더라구뇨ㅜㅜ 초코바처럼 단다한데다가 색도 먹음직,, 향이 안났다면 사람이 먹었을거같아요ㅋㅋㅋ 꼬리를 흔들면서 먹을정도로 기호성 완전 좋습니다!! 단단해서 소형견은 진짜 오래먹을거같아요ㅎㅎ 앞니로 갉아먹고 중대형견은 어금니로 깨물어 먹네요ㅎㅎ
간식에 눈이 돌아간(?) 모습 보고싶으시다면 다이너바이트 너무 좋은것 같네요!! 간식 이름도 넘나리 센스쟁이,,,
reviews.content_en: The palatability is seriously amazing ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ From the moment we got it, she knew it was a treat and was already sniffing excitedly, and the package is so cute too ㅜㅜ It's sweet like a chocolate bar and looks so appetizing... if it didn't have that smell, I swear I would've eaten it myself ㅋㅋㅋ She wags her tail while eating it—the palatability is absolutely perfect!! Since it's firm, small breeds will really take a long time eating it ㅎㅎ She gnaws with her front teeth and medium to large dogs bite it with their molars ㅎㅎ If you want to see your dog go crazy for treats, BITE ME seems like such a great choice!! Even the treat name is super clever...

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content:
바잇미에서 새로 나왔다해서 쓰윽 보다가 성분 좋고 휴대하기 편하고 기호성까지 있으면 말해뭐해 그와중에 세일까지 하고 있어서 ,, 안살수가 없었조 ,, 😘
빠르게 주문하고 받아서 바로 먹여봤는데 우선 포장 뜯자마자 하나 뺏기고 겨우겨우 먹였는데 손가락 뜯어지는줄 알았습니다
훈련할때 조금씩 짤라써도 좋을거 같구 우선 산책나갈때 쏙쏙 뽑아서 챙겨나가면 구웃 🧚🏻‍♀️
완벽 그 잡채입니두 ,, 다음엔 연어로 질러보겠습니다
reviews.content_en: I heard BITE ME came out with something new so I quickly checked it out, and with good ingredients, easy portability, AND great palatability—what more could you ask for? And they're even having a sale... there's no way I couldn't buy it 😘 I quickly ordered and gave it as soon as it arrived, and the second I opened the package one got snatched away from me—I barely managed to give one and thought my finger was about to get bitten off! 😅 It seems perfect for training too—just breaking off a little piece, and when we go for walks I can just pop them out and take them along 🧚🏻‍♀️ Totally perfect, you know!! Next time I'm going to try the salmon flavor.

reviews.name: 위****
reviews.content:
정말 다른 말로 형용이 안되고.
사월이가 원래 간식을 좋아하긴 하지만 이렇게 환장하고 먹는건 처음 봤어요💖 바잇미 간식 최고~흥해랏 에너지바
사월이한테 일용할 간식을 만들어주신 바잇미에게 이런 영광을 드립니다!!
reviews.content_en:
Honestly, there's really no other way to describe it.
Saweol usually likes treats, but this is the first time I've seen her go absolutely crazy for one like this 💖 BITE ME treats are the best~Fighting, energy bar!
I'm honored to give this praise to BITE ME for making a daily treat for Saweol!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 낱개로 치면 비싸김한데 멍몽이가 정말 조아해여 다만 잡고 먹을줄은 몰라서 칼로 잘라주는데 자를때 너무 힘들지도 않는 정도라 적당히 좋은거같아여!! 찐득하지 않아 털에 엉키거나 목에 걸릴 염려도 앖고 목욕하고 나서 보상으로 딱입니당 세번째 구매에요!
reviews.content_en: Per piece it's a bit pricey, but Mongmong really loves it! The only thing is she didn't know how to hold and eat it at first, so I cut it with a knife—but it cuts pretty easily without being too hard, so it seems just right!! It's not sticky so there's no worry about it getting tangled in her fur or getting stuck in her throat, and it's perfect as a reward after bath time. This is my third purchase! 🐾

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
선물받아서 먹여봤는데 너무 잘먹어서 구매해봅니다!
간단하게 가지고 다니기도 좋은것같아요
reviews.content_en:
I got it as a gift and she ate it so well that I'm buying it myself!
It also seems really convenient to carry around easily.

reviews.name: J****
reviews.content:
잘 받았습니다 
애정하는 강아지 용품 판매업체중에 
바잇미를 좋아하는데요 
바잇미 에서 나오는 출시제품들은 
매번 믿고 구매하고 있어요 
애기들이 잘 먹어서 신제품 구매해 봅니다 
항상 믿을수 있는 제품으로 잘 만들어주세요
reviews.content_en:
Received it safely. 📦
Among the dog product brands I love, I'm a fan of BITE ME.
I trust and buy every new product that BITE ME releases.
The pups eat them so well that I'm trying their new products.
Please keep making reliable products for us! 🐕❤️

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 처음사봤는데 환장하고 먹네요ㅋ 에너지바먹고 힘내렴 버들
reviews.content_en: Bought it for the first time and she's absolutely crazy for it ㅋ Eat the energy bar and get strong, Beodeul!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 잘먹어서 두개더샀어요 ! 관절에도 좋다고하니 자주맥일게요
reviews.content_en: She's eating it so well that I bought two more! Since it's good for joints, I'll be giving it to her often.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 같개로 샀다가 아이가 너무 좋아해서 박스로 구매했어요
reviews.content_en: I first bought just one as a sample, but my pup loved it so much that I ended up ordering a whole box!

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 진짜 기호성 최고에요!!저희집강아지는 큰간식은잘못먹어서 잘라서 급여했는데,부드러워서 자르기도편하고 트릿처럼 잘라서 노즈워크간식으로 사용해도 좋은것같아요!무엇보다 낱게로 포장되어있어서 산책간식이나 여행갈때 들고가기 넘편해요:)
reviews.content_en: The palatability is seriously the best!! My dog doesn't usually eat large treats, so I cut it up for her, and it's so soft that it's easy to cut. I even use it as training treats for nose work games! Best of all, it comes individually wrapped, so it's super convenient to take on walks or trips 🙂

reviews.name: 하****
reviews.content: 잘먹어요. 낱개 구매해서 잘먹는거 보고 한박스 주문했어요. 하루에 한개씩 주는 재미도 있고 잘먹으니 기분좋네요
reviews.content_en: She eats it well. After buying individual pieces and seeing her enjoy them, I ordered a whole box. There's something fun about giving her one a day, and since she eats it so well, it makes me happy!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
와 완전만족.. 재구매 의사200퍼에요 제가 저희강쥐 어렸을때 개껌먹는 교육을 잘못시켜서.. 우피말고는 먹을때 안잡아주면 못먹거든여.진득핱겅 온몸에 다 묻히도 먹규..흑흑 그래서 얘도 사서 잘라줘볼까 했는데 일단 너무신이 났더라구요 그래서 일당 그냥 줫더니 첨엔 물고만 있다가 나중엔 지 나름대로 열심히 갉아먹더라구옄ㅋㅋㅋ 근데 답답해해서 또 어쩔수없이 잡고 먹이긴 했지만 그래도 너무 딱딱하거나 너무 흐물하거나 진득거리지않아 적당히 씹어먹기도 좋고 삼키는데도 걱정이없어 잘먹였습니다
재구매 의사 200퍼구용 강쥐 목욕하고나면 보상으로 개껌주기 좀 그랬는데 얘 줘야겠어요 ㅎㅎㅎ 가금류알러지가있는데 마침 연어맛이 잇어 좋네요 냄새는 쥐포냄시나요 나두먹고 싶..
reviews.content_en: Wow, completely satisfied.. I'd repurchase 200%! I didn't teach my pup proper chewing habits when she was little, so she can only eat things if I hold them for her (other than rawhide chew). She gets it all over her body and makes a mess ㅠㅠ So I thought about buying this and cutting it up for her, but when I opened it, the smell was so good! At first I just gave it to her whole and she only held it in her mouth, but then she started gnawing on it on her own lol lol But she got frustrated and I had to hold it while feeding her anyway. Still, it's not too hard, not too soft, and not sticky—just the right texture for chewing, and I'm not worried about swallowing. She eats it great! 200% repurchase rate for sure 🤪 I used to feel weird giving her a chew treat after bathtime, but I'll definitely give her this one! My dog has poultry allergies and this comes in salmon flavor so that's perfect. The smell is like dried squid... I want to eat it too..

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 첫째가 잘 먹어요. 첫째는 씹는 거 좋아하는 아이에요. 둘째는 씹는 거 싫어하는 아이라 그런지 겉만 빨아먹고 안 먹네요 ㅋㅋㅋ 첫째는 너무 잘 먹어요. 한 개 순삭♡ 담에 첫째용으로 또 살께요♡
reviews.content_en: My first one eats it really well. She likes chewing. My second one doesn't like chewing, so she just sucks on the outside and doesn't finish it lol But my first one absolutely loves it. Gone in one bite! ♡ I'll buy it again next time for the first one! ♡

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
기호성 정말 정말 대박이에요! 
입 까다롭고 아무거나 잘 안먹는 강아지들도 다이너바이트 주면 환장 할 것 같아요 >.<
개별 포장되어 있어서 놀러갈때나 산책할때 무조건 들고 나가요! 
정말 강력추천입니다 💚
reviews.content_en:
The palatability is seriously amazing! Even picky eaters who don't eat just anything would probably go crazy for DYNA BITE >.<
It comes individually wrapped, so I always bring it on trips or walks!
Highly recommend!! 💚

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content: 테디 먹는 양을 늘려주려고 주문한건데 부드러워서 큰거 잘 안먹는 테디도 열심히 먹더라구요! 제가 반으로 잘라서 줬는데 확실히 부드러웠어요! 눈물이 많은 아이인데 눈에 좋은 영향 많이 줬으면 좋겠네요 :)
reviews.content_en: I ordered this to increase Teddy's food intake, but since it's soft, even Teddy who doesn't usually eat large treats ate it eagerly! I cut it in half for her and it was definitely soft! She has a lot of eye discharge, so I hope this helps her eyes 🙂

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
샘플로 다른맛 온거 먹여봤는데 잘먹어서 주문해봤어요.
생각보다 단단해서 먹기 힘들어하긴 하는데 잘게 잘라서 주니까 엄청 조아해요! 통채로 먹이지는 않고 잘게 잘라서 급여하고 있습니다. 너무 조아해요
reviews.content_en: I tried a different flavor sample and she ate it well, so I ordered this one. It's firmer than I expected so she struggles a bit eating it whole, but when I cut it into small pieces she loves it so much! I'm giving it to her cut up in small pieces, not whole. She absolutely loves it!

reviews.name: 연****
reviews.content: 입짧은 아이라 안먹을까봐 전에 맛보기로 하나씩만 시켰었는데 잘먹어서 더 많은 양으로 주문했어여 역시나 잘먹네요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Since she has a small mouth, I was worried she might not eat it, so I ordered individual pieces as a trial first. She ate them well so I ordered a larger quantity. And sure enough, she eats it great! 😄

reviews.name: A****
reviews.content: 적당히 말랑해서 먹이기 좋고 기호성도 좋습니다 맛있는 냄새나요
reviews.content_en: It's soft enough to be easy to feed, and my pup loves it. It smells delicious!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
에너지바 처럼 생긴게 신기해서 주문 해 봤어요. 받아보자마자 하나 먹였는데 뜯기도 전에 난리네요 ㅎㅎ 너무 물렁 하지도 않고 너무 딱딱하지도 않아서 좋아요 냄새도 살짝 피넛버터 향 나는게 기호성 너무 좋습니다👍 
지퍼백 포장이라 보관하기도 용이하고 재구매 의사 100% 입니다.
reviews.content_en: I ordered it because it looked cool like an energy bar. As soon as I got it, I gave my dog one and he went crazy before I even opened the package ㅎㅎ It's not too soft and not too hard, which is perfect. It has a slight peanut butter smell that my dog absolutely loves 👍 The zipper bag packaging makes storage super convenient, and I'm 100% planning to reorder.

reviews.name: 뭉****
reviews.content: 너무 잘먹어요 잘라주기에도 좋고 처음 나왔을때 먹여보고 오랜만에 먹이는데 잘먹네요
reviews.content_en: My dog eats it so well! It's great for cutting up, and I haven't given it in a while but he still eats it just as well as when it first came out.

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
장난감 샀을때 사은품으로 주셔서 울 애기한테 먹였더니
넘 잘 먹어서 구매했어요
딱딱한거 안 먹는 푸들인데 요건 살짝 말랑거려서
가위로 잘라서 주니 엄청 잘 씹어  먹어요
reviews.content_en: I got this as a free gift when I bought a toy and fed it to my pup, and he ate it so well that I bought more! My poodle doesn't usually eat hard treats, but this one is slightly soft, so when I cut it with scissors and give it to him, he chews it really well.

reviews.name: 고****
reviews.content:
기호성 체고에요! 
주변에두 나눠줬는데 다 잘먹더라구요
말랑해서 통째로줘도 잘먹지만,
전 미니트릿처럼 먹이는 것도 좋아서
요러케 사진 찍어봤네여!
reviews.content_en: The palatability is top-notch! I shared it with people around me and they all said their dogs ate it well. It's soft so they eat it whole, but I also like giving it as a mini treat like this, so I took some photos!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 다이너바이트 에너지바 어디 놀러가거나 산책갈때 하나씩 챙겨가서 주면 좋더라구용~ 기호성도 좋구 사람 에너지바마냥 기운도 충전되는것같아 좋습니당ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I bring DYNA BITE energy bars with me whenever I go out for a walk or trip, and my dog loves them~ The palatability is great and it's like the dog version of a human energy bar - it seems to really recharge their energy ㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 우리 설이는 정말 소문난 입짧녀에 미식견이에요 야외에서는 잘 먹지 않는 설이가 봉투 소리부터 관심을 보이더니 너무 잘 먹는 거 있죠 3가지 맛 모두 기호성이 높아서 대만족합니다 개별 포장으로 산책이나 마실 나갈 때 하나씩 챙겨가고 있어요 입짧은 강아지 친구들에게 추천합니다 💕💕
reviews.content_en: My Seol is famous for being a picky eater with refined taste. She doesn't usually eat well outdoors, but the moment she heard the bag, she was interested and ate it so well! All three flavors have great palatability and I'm very satisfied. Since they come individually wrapped, I bring one along on walks or outings. I recommend this to friends with picky eaters 💕💕

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
에너지바 디자인이 너무 예뻐요~
바잇미 디자인 칭찬해요! 구매욕구 팡팡 ㅎㅎㅎ

우리집 댕댕이 자기 간식인것 알고 오네요 ㅋ
오리 잘 먹으면 연어도 구매해 보고 싶네요
길이는 대략 5cm이고 맛있는 냄새가 나네요
제법 무게도 있어서 한개 다 주면 배부를것 같아요
촉촉 쫀득해서 이빨에 무리도 안가고 
기호성은 정말 대박!!!! 
대량으로 재구매 하러 갑니다~~~~~
reviews.content_en: The energy bar design is so pretty~ I love BITE ME's design! It makes me want to buy more ㅎㅎㅎ My pup knows it's her treat! If she likes the duck flavor, I want to try the salmon too. The length is about 5cm and it smells delicious. It's got decent weight to it, so one whole bar seems like it would be filling. It's moist and chewy so it doesn't put stress on the teeth, and the palatability is seriously amazing!!!! I'm going back for a bulk reorder~~~~~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
간혹 밥을 안먹거나 덜 먹는 경우가 있어서 그럴때 주려고 맛별로 되어있는 미니 에너지바 구매했어요.
간식이라고 아는지 꺼내기만하면 신나서 빨리 달라고 재촉하네요.
그래도 이 에너지바 먹어서 그런지 밥을 더 달라거나 배고프다고 보채진 않는것 같아요.
reviews.content_en: My dog sometimes skips meals or eats less, so I bought the mini energy bars in different flavors for those times. As soon as I take one out, he gets so excited and rushes me for it. But after eating these energy bars, he doesn't seem to beg for more food or act hungry.

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
처음에 샘플로 주셔서 잘 먹길래  다시 시켰어여!  그리고
마침 세일도하고 하고 아주 싸게 잘 산거 같아서 기분도 좋
네여! 입이 까칠한 아이인데 잘먹어줘서 다행이예여!
reviews.content_en: They gave me a sample at first and my dog ate it well, so I ordered again! Plus there was a sale going on so I got a really good deal and I'm happy about it! My pup is usually picky, but I'm so glad he eats these well!

reviews.name: 변****
reviews.content:
엄청 잘먹어요 ㅎㅎㅎ
놀러 나가서 출출할때 간식주기 딱 좋네용
reviews.content_en: They absolutely love it haha 😂 It's perfect for giving them a snack when we're out and about getting a little peckish

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 여기 재품은 다 좋아요. 믿고 먹알 수 있어요
reviews.content_en: All the products here are great. You can trust and feed them with confidence

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
체험단 당첨돼서 먹여봤는데 너무 만족스러워서 재구매할거같아요
우선 기호성이 너무 좋아요!!건사료 절대 안먹고 동결건조사료랑 화식만 먹는 입짧은 댕댕인데 이건 뜯자마자 순삭했어요
그리고 성분도 좋고 국내생산이라 믿고 먹일수있겠더라구요
또 실외배변댕이라 밖에 자주 나가는데 들고다니기 너무 편해요 
산책가방에 세네개 넣어도 가볍고 친구들 나눠주기에도 개별포장이라 너무 좋아요
다들 다이너바이트바 하세요👍
reviews.content_en: I won a trial pack and fed it to my pup, and I'm so satisfied I'm definitely repurchasing! First of all, the palatability is amazing!! My picky eater won't touch regular kibble and only eats freeze-dried food and fresh meals, but this one disappeared in seconds after I opened it! Plus the ingredients are good and it's made domestically so I can feed it with confidence. Also, my pup goes outside a lot for bathroom breaks, so it's so convenient to carry around. Even with three or four in my walk bag they're light, and they come in individual packs which is perfect for sharing with friends. Everyone should try DINO BYTE BAR 👍

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 졸귀탱 간식이 출시된다는 말에 대기타다가 출시되자마자 구매했어요! 일단 크기는 점보 지우개 만하구요 냄새는 땅콩버터 향이 나는 애너지바 냄새에요 그래놀라 향도 고소하게 나고 싱싱한 꼬기가 들어갔지만 꼬리꼬리한 냄새는 안나요! 강아지가 원래 비닐봉투나 안뜯은 간식에 관심 없는데 이거는 봉지째 물고 다녀서 왜지 했는데 잘 먹어요!!! 다들 이거 사서 외출에 하나씩 들구 가세요!!!! ♡
reviews.content_en: I was waiting to hear about the cute snack launch and bought it right away when it came out! The size is about that of a jumbo eraser, and it smells like a peanut butter-flavored energy bar with a nutty granola scent. It has fresh meat pieces but doesn't have that fishy smell! My dog usually doesn't care about plastic bags or unopened treats, but this one she carried around in her mouth, so I was curious, but she eats it great!!! Everyone should buy this and bring one along when you go out!!!! ♡

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
정말 에너지바예요.
크기도 크고 식감도 부드럽고
어제 도착해서 조금 잘라주고 정리하는데 나머지 가져다 아주 잘 먹네요~~
reviews.content_en: It's really an energy bar. The size is big and the texture is soft, and it arrived yesterday so I gave her a little piece and after organizing the rest, she ate it really well~~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 진짜패키지도 이쁘고 새로나오자마자 바로샀어요 오자마자먹여보니 은근딱딱하지만 잘깨물어 야물딱지게도먹네요 칼로리땜시 반잘라서 두번나누어서 먹였어요 너무너무잘먹어요 재구매백퍼입니다~~
reviews.content_en: The packaging is so pretty and I bought it right away when it came out! I fed it to her as soon as it arrived and while it's a bit firm, she chews it well and eats it solidly. I cut it in half because of the calories and fed it in two servings. She eats it so so well! Definitely repurchasing~~

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
포장이 너무 예뻐요
제가 먹고싶다구요
사람이 안 먹게 조심해야겠어요
기호성 굿 재구매하렵니등
reviews.content_en: The packaging is so pretty 😍 I want to eat it myself 😂 I need to be careful so people don't eat it. Great palatability ✓ Will definitely repurchase

reviews.name: 연****
reviews.content: 입짧은 아이라 안먹을수도 있을거같아서 맛 하나씩만 구매해봤는데 너무 잘먹네요...?다음엔 대용량으로 사야될까봐요ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Since my pup is a picky eater, I thought she might not eat it so I bought just one flavor to try, but she eats it so well...? I think I need to get the larger size next time ㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
바잇미 신상 간식! 미니 에너지마 마이너바이트 !!
바잇미 제품이라 믿고 보리에게 줬습니다! 
일단 뒤에 성분표를 보면 강아지에게 좋은 식품이 들어가서 
마음이 놓이더라구요 ! 그리고 개별포장이라 들고 다니기 좋고 위생적이였어요 .

🔹든든한 에너지바
🔹신선한 휴먼그레이드 원육
🔹진짜 중요한 HACCP 인증 시설인 안전한 국내! 제조사에서     생산!!!!!!! 

다른 좋은 점 많지만 이 3가지가 저한테는 제일 중요한 조건이였어요! 모두 충족시키는 이 간식 추천해요!! 

그리고 기호도도 높아서 제가 포장지 만지기만하면 보리가 달려와요 ㅋㅋㅋ 또 먹고싶어서 ! 

재구매의사 엄청 완전 있는 제품 입니다 🙆🏻‍♀️
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME's new snack! Mini Energy Bar MINOR BITE!! Since it's a BITE ME product, I gave it to Bori with confidence! First, looking at the ingredient label on the back, it has good nutritious food for dogs so I felt at ease! And since it comes in individual packs it's convenient to carry around and hygienic.

🔹A satisfying energy bar
🔹Fresh human-grade raw meat
🔹Really important HACCP certified facility, safe domestic manufacturing!!!!!!!!

There are many other good things, but these 3 points were the most important conditions for me! This treat meets all of them so I recommend it!! And since the palatability is so high, Bori comes running whenever I just touch the wrapper ㅋㅋㅋ She wants to eat it again! This is a product I definitely want to repurchase 🙆🏻‍♀️

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
💥바잇미에서 나온 신상 간식💥
   [미니 에너지바 다이너바이트]
뚱띠, 노랑이가 먼저 먹어보았습니다🐶

✅️ 강아지를 위한 든든한 에너지 바

✅️ 신선한 휴먼그레이드 원육이 통째로‼️

✅️ HACCP 인증 안전한 국내 제조사 생산

✅️ 개별포장으로 어디서든 간편하게 급여가능

✅️ 우리아이 최애 특식 기호성 최고‼️

개별포장으로 보관 편리하고 한개씩 들고
산책 나가기 좋아요
저희 아이들한텐 한입에 넣기 큰 크기라
먹기 편하게 작게 잘라주었는데 
큰 힘 안들이고 손으로도 잘 부셔지더라구요
우리 노랑이 접시 싹싹 긁어먹는거봐요😋
기호성 최고ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
울애기들 든든한 영양간식으로 굿굿👍
reviews.content_en:
💥 New snack from BITE ME 💥
[Mini Energy Bar DINO BYTE]
Our Ttungtti and Norangi tried it first 🐶

✅️ A satisfying energy bar for dogs
✅️ Fresh human-grade raw meat whole pieces‼️
✅️ HACCP certified safe domestic manufacturer production
✅️ Individual packaging for convenient feeding anywhere
✅️ Our baby's favorite special treat, top palatability‼️

It's convenient to store with individual packs and easy to bring one along on walks. For my pups the size is big for one bite so I cut it into smaller pieces for easier eating, and it breaks apart easily even by hand without much effort. Look at our Norangi licking the plate clean 😋 Top tier palatability ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ A satisfying nutritious treat for our babies, great stuff 👍

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
바잇미에서 자주 쇼핑하는데 체험단 돼서 
먼저 체험할 수 있어서 좋네용!!
손으로 잘 부서지기도 하구 개별포장이라 
밖에 나가면 하나씩 들고 나가서 줘도 편해요

냄새는 무슨 냄새인지 모르겠지만 
댕댕이들이 좋아하는 향기인걸루!! 
저희 강아지 코가 옴청 벌렁벌렁 난리났거든요ㅎㅎ

이번엔 전과 다른맛으로 닭고기,소고기,참치 3가지 종류!
다양한 맛으로 선택 가능해서 좋아요!
전 여러맛으로 맛보고 싶어서 믹스인 3가지 종류를
한팩씩 받았습니다:)

알러지나 댕댕이들 상태에 따라 
구매하고 급여하셔야 할 것 같아요!!
reviews.content_en:
I shop at BITE ME often, and I'm so glad I got to try this as a tester first! 😊 The treats crumble easily in your hand and come individually wrapped, which is super convenient—when we go out, I can just grab one at a time to give to my pup.

I'm not sure what the smell is exactly, but it's definitely a scent doggies love! My dog's nose was going absolutely crazy 🐽

This time they came in three different flavors—chicken, beef, and tuna—unlike before! I love having options for different tastes. I got one pack of each flavor mix because I wanted to try them all 😊

I think you should check for allergies and your pup's condition before buying and feeding these!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
편식쟁이+입 짧음+의심많음+취향 아니면 무조건 안먹는...
아주아주 까딸스러운 입맛을 가지고 있어서 뭔가 새로 구입할 때마다 안 먹을까봐 조마조마한 마음으로 구입합니다 ㅠ

일단 다이너바이트는 맛 선택폭이 다양해서 좋아하는 맛으로 구입할 수 있어서 좋았습니다
저희 아기는 닭고기, 돼지고기, 오리고기, 소고기를 좋아해서 좋아하는 맛으로만 골라서 구입했습니다 (양고기, 연어, 황태, 해산물 불호..)
닭고기, 오리고기, 소고기 맛으로 구입했는데 모두 잘 먹습니다
입도 짧아서 금방 질려해서 여러가지 맛 돌아가면서 주고 있어요

개별 포장이 되어 있어서 산책 나갈때 하나씩 들고 가기 편하다는 점이 가장 큰 장점 같아요
따로 용기에 담아서 갈 필요 없이 그냥 하나 챙겨서 나가면 되니까 너무 편해요

원래 밖에서 뭘 잘 안 먹는데(물도 안마셔요) 다이너바이트는 그래도 주면 먹긴하더라구요ㅋㅋ

꽤나 맛있게 먹는것 같아서 다행입니다 ㅎㅎ
다 먹으면 재구매할 예정입니다~
reviews.content_en:
My pup is such a picky eater + has a small mouth + is super suspicious + absolutely won't eat anything if it's not their preference... basically a very finicky eater, so I always buy new treats nervously wondering if they'll refuse 😅

Firstly, DINER BITE is great because there's a wide variety of flavors to choose from, so I can buy the ones my pup likes. My baby likes chicken, pork, duck, and beef, so I only picked out those flavors (not a fan of lamb, salmon, pollock, or seafood...). I got the chicken, duck, and beef flavors and they eat all of them well! Since they get bored easily, I rotate between different flavors.

The biggest advantage is definitely the individual packaging—it's so convenient to grab one for our walks. I don't need to bring a separate container; I just grab one and go!

Normally my pup doesn't eat much when we're outside (they won't even drink water 😅), but with DINER BITE they'll still eat it if I give it to them! I'm so relieved that they seem to really enjoy it 😄 I'm planning to repurchase once they finish!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
바잇미간식 또는 제품을 애용하는 편인데 좋은 품질, 가성비 등 반려인의 마음을
잘 파악하고 만드신 것 같아서 최근에는 우비도 구매했었답니당

요번에 먹여본 다이너바이트는 HACCP인증 안전한 국내 제조사 생산과
신선한 휴먼그레이드원육이 통째로 들어가있다고 해서 더욱 믿음이 갔습니다

국내산 눈에 불을 켜고 찾는 편이라 대만족!
개별 포장이라 어디든 쉽게 들고다니면서 간편하게 급여하기 좋았어요
강아지를 위한 든든한 단백질간식이라 여름보양간식으로 딱일듯합니당!

맛있게 먹는 모습만 봐도 굳이 제가 안 먹어봐도 맛있을 것 같더라구요 ㅋㅋㅋ 
쇼파까지 싹싹 핥아서 부스러기 깔끔 처리해버리네용 ㅋㅋㅋ
빈 비닐포장까지 훔쳐 달아나서 아직까지 물어뜯고 집착중입니다..ㅎㄷㄷ
reviews.content_en:
I regularly use BITE ME treats and products, and they really seem to understand pet parents' needs well in terms of quality and value—I even bought the raincoat from them recently!

DINER BITE gave me even more confidence because it's HACCP certified, made by a safe domestic manufacturer, and contains fresh human-grade whole meat. I always look for domestic products, so I'm completely satisfied! The individual packaging makes it super convenient to carry around and feed anytime, anywhere. It's the perfect protein snack for summer wellness treats for your pup! 🐕

Just watching them eat so happily makes it obvious it tastes good without me even trying it 😂 They even licked the couch clean and got every crumb! They even stole the empty wrapper and are still obsessed with chewing on it 😅

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
바잇미에서 나온 신상 간식을 미루가 먼저 체험할 수 있게 도와주셨어요~ :)
 
첫 번째! 좋았던 부분은 개별 포장이 가능해서 외출 시 가지고 나가기 상당히 편해요! 산책 혹은 여행 시에 가지고 다니면서 급여하면 좋을 거 같아요.

두 번째! 좋았던 부분은 기호성이 좋은 거 같아요. ❤ 미루는 새로운 간식이랑 처음에 친해지는 데 시간이 걸리는데 바잇미에서 나온 미니 에너지바 다이너바이트 같은 경우에는 바로 잘 먹더라고요 ㅋㅋ 이미 최애 간식으로 등극!! YEAH !!✌🏻

세 번째! 좋았던 부분은 믿을 수 있는 바잇미에서 만들었다는 거예요. 아이들 옷 그리고 간식 등 관련된 건 어떠한 성분이 들어갔는지 그리고 어디에서 만들었는지 중요하게 보는 편이에요. HACCP 인증받은 안전한 국내 제조 시설에서 만들었다니 믿음이 갔어요. 거기에 휴먼 그레이드 원육이 통째로!! 안 사먹일 이유가 있나요~~ 맘에 들어요!!

우연히 체험단 기회로 간식을 접하게 된거지만, 이걸 다 먹이고 난 후에는 재구매 예정 1000%입니다!! 고마워요 바잇미~❤️
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME helped Miru get to try the new treat first~ 😊

First great thing: The individual packaging makes it super convenient to carry when going out! It would be perfect to bring on walks or trips and feed along the way.

Second great thing: The taste appeal is really good! ❤️ Miru usually takes time warming up to new treats, but with DINER BITE Mini Energy Bar from BITE ME, they just ate it right away! Already promoted to favorite treat status!! YEAH!!✌🏻

Third great thing: It's made by trustworthy BITE ME. For things related to my pup—clothes, treats, etc.—I really care about what ingredients are in them and where they're made. I was reassured knowing it's made in a safe domestic facility with HACCP certification, plus it has whole human-grade meat in it!! Why wouldn't I buy it~~ I'm really happy with it!!

I came across this treat by chance through the testing opportunity, but after we finish these, I'm 1000% planning to repurchase!! Thank you BITE ME~❤️

reviews.name: 민****
reviews.content:
다이너바이트 신제품 소고기, 참치, 닭고기맛을 먼저 먹어볼 수 있게 해주셔서 탄칸쵸가 먼저 먹어봤어요^^
⠀⠀
개별포장으로 8개씩 들어있어 휴대도 간편,
실온보관도 가능하고,
때에 따라 원하는 제품을 골라서 들고 나갈 수 있다는 게 제일 큰 장점인 것 같아요:)
⠀⠀
단면이 궁금해 잘라보았더니🙌🏻
신선한 휴먼그레이드 원육이 통째로 들어있어서 그런지
단면에 콕콕콕 박힌 원물이 다 보이더라구요👀
⠀⠀
제일 궁금한 참치맛,
평소 생선을 별로 좋아하지 않는 탄칸쵸가 잘 먹을지 궁금했는데
기호성 최강👍🏻 완전 극호😍
⠀⠀
엄마가 먹는 간식이랑 비슷하게 생겨서
엄마가 뺏어먹지 않게 조심해야겠어요🤣
reviews.content_en:
Tankantcho got to try the new DINER BITE flavors—beef, tuna, and chicken—first!! 😊

It comes with 8 pieces individually wrapped, so it's convenient to carry around. It can also be stored at room temperature, and you can choose which flavor you want to bring with you depending on the situation. That seems like the biggest advantage! 😊

I was curious about the cross-section so I cut one open 🙌🏻 Because it has fresh human-grade whole meat in it, I could see all the pieces of real meat packed throughout the cross-section! 👀

I was most curious about the tuna flavor. Tankantcho doesn't usually like fish much, so I wondered if they'd eat it, but... amazing taste appeal 👍🏻 They absolutely loved it 😍

They look so similar to mom's treats that I need to be careful mom doesn't steal them! 🤣

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
⠀
바잇미 미니 에너지 바 다이너바이트 신제품3종
소고기🐮닭고기🐔참치🐟
⠀
신제품은 못 참지 🤤🤤
누구보다 빠르게 신제품 체험 기회주신 #바잇미 🫶🏻
⠀
🔥강아지를 위한 든든한 에너지바
🔥신선한 휴먼그레이드 원육이 통째로
🔥HACCP인증 안전한 국내 제조사 생산
🔥개별포장
⠀
입맛 까다로운 차차도 눈 커지게 맛있는 최고의 기호성
애견운동장 뛰뛰 하고 더운 여름 에너지 충전 후 다시
신나게 놀수 있어서 너무나 행복 👍🏻
지금 바잇미에서 1+1+1 행사 하니 런런🏃🏻‍♀️🏃🏻‍♀️
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME Mini Energy Bar DINER BITE New 3 Flavors
Beef 🐮 Chicken 🐔 Tuna 🐟

I can't resist new products 🤤🤤
Thanks to #BITE ME for giving me the chance to try new products before anyone else 🫶🏻

🔥 A solid energy bar for your pup
🔥 Fresh human-grade whole meat included
🔥 HACCP certified safe domestic manufacturer
🔥 Individual packaging

Even picky Chacha's eyes lit up—such amazing taste appeal! After some energetic playtime at the dog park, they can recharge and play again with such joy 👍🏻 BITE ME is doing a 1+1+1 deal right now, so go grab some! 🏃🏻‍♀️🏃🏻‍♀️

reviews.name: 심****
reviews.content:
댕댕이들을 위한 에너지바 느낌의 간식!
휴먼그레이드 원육에  HACCP인증 국내 제조사 생산으로 믿고 먹일 수 있어요~

맛은 소고기, 닭고기, 참치맛 세 가지.
입맛이 까다로운 편이라 고민하다가
가금류를 좋아해서 닭고기맛으로 골랐는데 
우와 엄청 잘먹어요😋 기호성 좋아요!!👍

딱딱하지 않고 씹으면 부스러지는 제형이라
손으로도 잘라줄 수 있어요. ㅎㅎ

개별포장이라 산책이나 놀러갔을 때 간식으로 하나씩 까먹기도 딱 좋을 것 같아요!
reviews.content_en:
An energy bar-style treat for your pups! Made with human-grade whole meat and produced by a HACCP certified domestic manufacturer, so you can feed it with confidence~ 🐕

There are three flavors: beef, chicken, and tuna. My pup is a picky eater, so I thought about it and chose chicken since they like poultry. Wow, they eat it so well! 😋 Great taste appeal!! 👍

It's not hard and crumbles when you chew it, so you can even cut it with your hand 😊 The individual packaging makes it perfect to grab one at a time for walks or outings!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
엄마랑 똑같이 저질체력인 솜이를 위해 에너지바 사드렸어요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
처음 먹어보는 간식은 킁킁이를 한참 하다가 입에 가져가는데.. 다이너바이트는 그냥 달려드네요ㅎㅎㅎ  완전 잘먹어요!!
솜이가 급하게 먹는 아이라 반으로 잘라서 급여했는데 겉은 단단하고 안쪽은 촉촉해서 꼭꼭 잘 씹어먹으니 좋네요! 
하나씩 개별포장되어있어서 편리해요! 
카페가서 뛰뛰하기전에 먹이니까 날아다녀요 :) 하핫
reviews.content_en: I got this energy bar for Somi since they have just as low stamina as mom 😅😅 Usually when trying a new treat for the first time, they sniff around for a while before eating, but with DINER BITE they just dive right in! 😄 They eat it so well! Since Somi eats quickly, I broke it in half to give it to them. The outside is firm and the inside is moist, so they chew it really well! 😊 Since it comes individually wrapped, it's super convenient! I give it to them before playtime at the cafe and they zoom around 😄

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
♥️장점
✅ 한 입 크기의 부드러운 식감으로 소형견도 쉽게 먹을 수 있음
✅ 오리고기 베이스로 기호성이 높아 편식하는 강아지도 잘 먹음
✅ 고단백 간식이라 산책이나 훈련 후 에너지 보충용으로 적합
✅ 손에 기름기가 많이 남지 않아 급여하기 편리함
✅ 작은 사이즈로 나와서 휴대성이 좋아 외출 시 간식으로 딱!

♥️ 후기
소형견 간식으로 딱 좋은 사이즈와 부드러운 질감이라 강아지가 정말 잘 먹어요! 특히 오리고기라 그런지 기호성이 좋아서 편식하는 아이도 거부감 없이 먹더라고요. 에너지 바라서 그런지 단순한 간식 느낌보다는 산책 후나 훈련 보상용으로 주기 좋았어요. 개별 포장이라 신선하게 보관할 수 있고, 가방에 넣어 다니기에도 편리해서 재구매 의사 100%입니다!
reviews.content_en:
❤️ Pros
✅ Soft, bite-sized pieces that small dogs can easily eat
✅ Duck meat base provides high palatability, so even picky eaters enjoy it
✅ High-protein treat, perfect for energy replenishment after walks or training
✅ Doesn't leave much oil on your hands, convenient to feed
✅ Compact size with great portability—perfect for on-the-go treats!

❤️ Review
The perfect size and soft texture for small dog treats—my pup really enjoys it! Especially since it's duck-based, the taste appeal is great, so even my picky eater has no problem eating it. Since it's an energy bar, it's better suited for post-walk or training rewards rather than just a simple snack. Individual packaging keeps it fresh and it's easy to carry in my bag, so I'm 100% planning to repurchase!

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
처음 당첨된 체험담ㅠㅠㅠ
진짜 요즘 매일을 바잇미에서 배송받는중인데 바잇미 체험단이라니?!

우리 모모가 기존 제품도 아주 잘 먹고있었다구요!
아주 환장하는 간식중 하나🫶

새로운맛이 나왔다고해서 믹스3종으로 결정
*소고기.닭고기.참치맛으로 기호성 끝판왕*
!게다가!

>강아지를 위한 에너지바
>신선한 휴먼그레이드 원육이 그대로!
>어디서든 간편하게 먹일수있는 개별포장

야외활동시 간편하게 하나씩 챙겨나가 에너지보충을 할수있다구!
reviews.content_en:
First time winning a test opportunity 😭😭 I've been getting BITE ME deliveries almost every day lately, and I got picked as a tester?!

Our Momo was already eating their existing products really well—one of their absolute favorite treats! 🫶

Since there's a new flavor, I decided to go with the mix of 3 kinds
*Beef, chicken, and tuna flavors—ultimate taste appeal*
And plus!

>Energy bar for your pup
>Fresh human-grade whole meat as-is!
>Individual packaging for convenient feeding anywhere

When doing outdoor activities, you can just grab one and go for an energy boost!
